response.justification: The candidate is technically an excellent match on the stack — strong TypeScript/Node.js, React, REST APIs, Kubernetes, AWS, and even the nice-to-have LLM/MCP integration experience. However, with nearly 20 years of experience and current Staff-level employment at Google, he is significantly overqualified for an entry-level junior/mid fullstack position, raising serious questions about motivation, salary fit, and retention. He is Berlin-based, which suits the high on-site requirement, but the seniority mismatch is the dominant risk.
strengths: Deep TypeScript/Node.js and fullstack experience directly matching the core stack
Nice-to-haves covered: LLM/agent tooling (MCP), AWS, Kubernetes, Docker
Berlin-based with strong craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, clean architecture)
concerns: Severely overqualified — Staff engineer at Google applying to an entry-level role
Salary expectations and long-term retention likely misaligned with junior/mid position
PostgreSQL and Nest.js not explicitly evidenced (MongoDB/MySQL listed instead); German only basic

key_factors.factor: Stack alignment (TypeScript, React, Node, AWS, K8s, LLM)
Location fit for high on-site presence (Berlin)
